# Let's try to read the file. We'll list /mnt/data to see what files exist.
import os, textwrap, json, re, sys, pathlib, pprint, unicodedata

files = os.listdir('/mnt/data')
files

path = '/mnt/data/file-Hxtz9VuZpbHDnDndEcuJTq-Q064.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:3000]

import re

text = open('/mnt/data/file-Hxtz9VuZpbHDnDndEcuJTq-Q064.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()

pattern_aya = re.compile(r'\{([^}]*)\}\s*\[([^\]]+)\]')
pattern_hadith = re.compile(r'\"([^"]+)\"\s*\(([^)]+)\)')

ayas = []
for m in pattern_aya.finditer(text):
    span_text = m.group(1)
    br_content = m.group(2)
    span_start = m.start(1)
    span_end = m.end(1)
    ayas.append((span_text, br_content, span_start, span_end))
len(ayas), ayas[:5]

hads = []
for m in pattern_hadith.finditer(text):
    span_text = m.group(1)
    src = m.group(2)
    hads.append((span_text, src, m.start(1), m.end(1)))
hads

queries: ما نص آية سورة الفرقان الآية 1؟

فَبَشِّرْ أَهْلَ الْقُرَىٰ أَنَّهُ أَتَاكُم بِالْعِزَّةِ وَبِالْفَخَرِ لِلَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
نص سورة البقرة آية 98 ميكال جبريل
نص سورة البقرة آية 34 اسجدوا لآدم إلا إبليس
الفرقان 16 لهم فيها ما يشاؤون خالدين كان على ربك وعدا مسؤولا
وَمَن يُضْلِلِ اللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُ مِنْ وَلِيٍّ بَعْدَهُ
جبريل يأتيني في كل ليلة حتى يأتي رمضان أقبل رمضان رواه البخاري
أتاني جبريل هذا رمضان قد جاء حديث

رواه البخاري جبريل رمضان أقبل رمضان حديث
حديث: أتاكم رمضان شهر مبارك رواه من؟

action.query: جبريل يأتيني في كل ليلة حتى يأتي رمضان أقبل رمضان رواه البخاري
جبريل يعارضني القرآن كل سنة مرتين في العام الذي توفي فيه صحيح البخاري نص الحديث
Sahih al-Bukhari book number of Kitab Fada'il al-Qur'an 66 4711 hadith

output.code:
import re, json

text = open('/mnt/data/file-Hxtz9VuZpbHDnDndEcuJTq-Q064.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()

pattern_aya = re.compile(r'\{([^}]*)\}\s*\[([^\]]+)\]')
pattern_hadith = re.compile(r'\"([^"]+)\"\s*\(([^)]+)\)')

results = []

aya_list = []
for m in pattern_aya.finditer(text):
    span_text = m.group(1)
    br = m.group(2)
    # parse br like 'الفرقان: 1'
    br_parts = [p.strip() for p in br.split(':')]
    sura_name = br_parts[0]
    aya_num = None
    sura_num = None
    # map sura name to number
    sura_map = {'الفرقان':25,'البقرة':2,'الأنعام':6}
    if len(br_parts) > 1:
        try: aya_num = int(br_parts[1])
        except: 
            try:
                aya_num = int(re.sub(r'\D+','',br_parts[1]))
            except:
                aya_num = None
    sura_num = sura_map.get(sura_name, None)
    aya_list.append({
        'span_start': m.start(1),
        'span_end': m.end(1),
        'span_text': span_text,
        'br_content': br,
        'sura_name': sura_name,
        'sura_number': sura_num,
        'aya_number': aya_num
    })

had_list = []
for m in pattern_hadith.finditer(text):
    span_text = m.group(1)
    src = m.group(2)
    had_list.append({
        'span_start': m.start(1),
        'span_end': m.end(1),
        'span_text': span_text,
        'source': src
    })

aya_list, had_list

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
